item.title: A fat tiger to start your week
item.description:
“Good morning, Tiger!” (Biiiig stretch!) Original artist is Bu2ma (https://linktr.ee/bu2ma)
“A Tiger Ascends the Mountain”
“Tiger Crouching” (maybe there’s no Chinese equivalent to “loafing?”)
“Tiger Descending the Mountain”
“Tiger Goes Up the Mountain Again”
“The higher you climb, the colder it gets.”
“Tiger Descends the Mountain Again”
“A Tiger Roars in the Mountains”
“Beginning of Winter” (Imgur has trained me to automatically caption this as “It fucken wimdy!”)
“Tiger Descends the Mountain Again” (I dunno if the original artist reused their own artwork or if another artist did, so please don't yell)
“Spring Equinox”
“Unexpected Joy”
“Fat and closed-minded”
“Fat and Angry” (aka “Well now I am not doing it”)
“Where is my cell phone?”
“Tiger bathing”
“The quiet moments are not always there; let us cherish what we have.” I hope you all have a wonderful day (-:
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Love her energy
item.description: (fuck tiktok, I know, I can't remove the icon) If I wasn't already married. The fact that she still posted this is awesome. You have to be able to laugh at yourself.
item.dc:creator: nobodyspecial995

item.title: The type of patience you need.
item.description:
Swimming is bliss.
Owl is in awe. One love.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: PTGDump: Neurospicy Memes for Neurosexy People
item.description:
Hello everyone! Guess what... you're ALL neurosexy people.
OOOOOF
I always schedule my work meetings for morning hours. If I have an afternoon meeting, my productivity is wrecked.
For me, it depends on how crowded and noisy the environment is. If I'm in a loud bar, then I can't listen and I can't talk. A small and intimate dinner party, however? I'm one charming motherfucker.
Everything about that card and pin is creepy as absolute fucktoasters.
It was Comicon weekend here in KC. I'm going to need a month to recover.
I'd like to believe this isn't true. But the only peers/friends/classmates my kid knows who have been diagnosed with ADHD are boys. I haven't heard of a single girl in his cohort who has been diagnosed.
One could argue that perhaps the worksheet clearly mentions that the answer needs to be an analog clock with hands and that the student didn't pay attention. One could also argue that if whoever posted this is actually an educator, then they're a shitty educator. If you have students who can't read a clock, then you're just telling on yourself by complaining about it in a social media post.
Starting to think my breakfast wasn't the correct one.
We can smell our own. It's like in Spiderverse when the Spiders meet each other. "You're like me."
Lol.. I sort of feel like a lot of us do not realize that *not* being odd is an option. I tell my kid all the time to be weird, and make friends with the weird kids. Normal is so damn boring.
There's a lot of near-toxic positivity out there around ADHD. I hate hearing the word "Superpower" used when describing it. Yes, there are some benefits to the condition, but there are also some big fucking vulnerabilities with it that nobody talks about.
Check check and check.
"All you fuckers are doing it wrong, and it's pissing me off."
See? It's easy to talk about the vulnerabilities. ADHD isn't a superpower in my opinion. It's a physical difference in our brains that means we interact with the world differently. It's not "awesome," it's not something to be afraid of, it's not terrible. It just *is*. It's who we are as people, and we own our conditions simply by taking pride in ourselves. That's it.
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
In my case, it's a song I wake up with that plays until I take my stimulants. Today's song was Lovin' Touchin' Squeezin' by Journey.
I have started doing this with my wife and close friends, and it actually does help them tremendously.
Thanks for reading! Slide by my YT channel today for some pleasant background noise. www.youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: Monday Star Trek Memes!
item.description: EDIT: Monday Frontpage! Thank you very much Imgurians! I make reviews as a hobby, and this week I reviewed "Last Action Hero", one of the greatest bombs of the 90's, yet somehow considered one of the best movies of that era! You can watch the review here https://youtu.be/-d0lCYv8zCw
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: GovBrief Today #423
item.description: One day after eight million people marched in protest, the country quietly resumed springtime activities around vacations, basketball, and upcoming holidays. Lost in the day's sheer normalcy was Donald Trump's interview with the Financial Times, where he mused openly about invading Iran with ground troops. He told the paper that American forces could seize Kharg Island, Iran's main oil terminal, and admitted they would have to stay. This war is 32 days old and has spread across eight countries. Iran is threatening American and Israeli officials wherever they live and travel, including in Europe. Financial markets are spooked again, with oil prices jumping back to $116 a barrel after settling late last week. The last time a world war started, Americans managed to look the other way for more than two years. The internet won't grant us that luxury again. Pay attention this week. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 423 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260329-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-tanker [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar29 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/homan-airport [4] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-cage-match [5] https://go.govbrief.today/nk3-arrests Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: You can't be an ally and still consume media from a bad person
item.description: There is no "separating art from the artist". She is not a good person and is actively vying to eradicate Transgender people from existence. This is sickening. https://www.theverge.com/report/901818/hbo-harry-potter-jk-rowling-transphobia Trans people have a right to exist.
